title: MediaSessionService.dispatchVolumeKeyEvent 无权限 + caller-controlled asSystem flag — confused deputy
notes: Multiple ISessionManager methods lack permission checks: (1) dispatchVolumeKeyEvent takes boolean asSystem from caller - when true, volume adjustments execute with system_server uid/pid via Process.myUid()/myPid(). (2) dispatchVolumeKeyEventToSessionAsSystemService hardcodes asSystem=true. (3) dispatchMediaKeyEventToSessionAsSystemService allows key injection into any media session as system. All confirmed accessible from uid 2000. Compare with dispatchAdjustVolume which hardcodes asSystem=false, and addOnMediaKeyEventDispatchedListener which requires MEDIA_CONTENT_CONTROL.
